title: BlackBerry Q4 2020 Earnings Preview
text: The consensus EPS estimate for BlackBerry Q4 2020 was $0.04, down 63.6% year-over-year. The consensus revenue estimate was $296.29 million, up 15.3% year-over-year. BlackBerry was slated to report fourth-quarter 2020 earnings results on Tuesday, March 31, after the market closes. The top line was expected to be benefited by BlackBerry Cylance and licensing while results would be impacted by the crash of the auto industry due to turbulent market conditions and the likelihood of a severe recession. Over the previous 2 years, BB had beaten EPS estimates 100% of the time and had beaten revenue estimates 88% of the time.
